channel.title: Hengdu Tech - A2 Non-Combustible Aluminum Composite Panel
channel.description: Hengdu Tech is the world's first manufacturer of screw-extrusion A2 non-combustible aluminum composite panels. Zero water absorption, true A2 fire rating, 6 international certifications. Factory direct supply worldwide.

item.title: A2 Fire-Rated Non-Combustible Aluminum Composite Panel
item.description: Global first screw-extrusion A2 core technology. Zero water absorption. EN13501-1 Class A2-s1,d0 certified. True non-combustible ACP panel for high-rise building facades.

item.title: ACP Manufacturer - Aluminum Composite Panel Production
item.description: A2 granule production: 8 lines, 200 tons/day. A2 core coil: 1 line, 50 tons/day. Full production capacity for A2 non-combustible ACP manufacturing.

item.title: Non-Combustible Cladding Panel - Zero Water Absorption
item.description: True non-combustible cladding with zero water absorption. No delamination, no swelling. Meets ASTM E84 Class A and EN13501-1 A2 standards.

item.title: A2 Fire-Rated Panel Manufacturer - 6 International Certifications
item.description: 6 international fire safety certifications including EN13501-1, ASTM E84, GB 8624. Factory direct pricing with reliable quality.

item.title: Non-Combustible Aluminum Cladding - PVDF Coating
item.description: Non-combustible aluminum cladding with 15+ year PVDF coating warranty. Lightweight, high strength, ideal for building facade systems.

item.title: Zero Water Absorption A2 Core Material Technology
item.description: Global first screw-extrusion A2 core material. Zero water absorption means no delamination, no swelling, longer lifespan. Revolutionary technology.

item.title: Hengdu Tech - A2 Panel Manufacturer Homepage
item.description: Hengdu Tech manufactures A2 fire-rated non-combustible aluminum composite panels. World's first screw-extrusion A2 core technology. 6 international certifications. Supplying worldwide.
